channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.description:
Flytipping of furniture on pavement.

item.title: Bus stop H Burnt Ash Road Lee Road towards Blackheath Or Lewisham : missing route 261 E plate on north facing flag, 22nd March
item.description:
Bus stop H Burnt Ash Road Lee Road towards Blackheath or Lewisham : missing route 261 E plate on north facing flag See photographs Thank you

item.title: Garden waste flytipped, attracting more rubbish, 22nd March
item.description:
Garden waste flytipped by estate residents (I know the address); pile is now attracting more waste from other flytippers.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Blanchard Way, Hackney, London

item.title: Drain outside 134 Hayes Lane is loose and very noisy when vehicles drive over it, 22nd March
item.description:
Drain outside 134 Hayes Lane is loose and very noisy when vehicles drive over it. Disruptive to sleep etc

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 149, Hayes Lane, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Illegal parking in a bus stop, 22nd March
item.description:
Illegal parking in a bus stop. driver parked in bus lay by illegally whilst also facing oncoming traffic. REG NUMBER: EF75 MVV

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hutton Road, Shenfield, Brentwood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Contaminated garden waste bin repeatedly moved from 6 Forte Street to 1-3 Forte Street, 22nd March
item.description:
A garden waste bin from 6 Forte Street has been repeatedly left at 1–3 Forte Street. The bin has previously been tagged by the collection team as contaminated and was not collected. Despite this, it has been moved again and left at our location. Today, I personally witnessed the bin being moved and left outside our block. This has been an ongoing issue, where bins are not used correctly and contaminated bins are left for others to deal with. On previous occasions, empty bins from our block have been taken after collection, while contaminated bins were left behind. This is causing repeated inconvenience to residents who follow the waste disposal rules. Photo evidence is attached.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Master Gunner Place, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Communal bins on the Lynton estate, 22nd March
item.description:
This is a disgrace in the community Adds to the already verminous problem we have in this estate Since 21st March

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lynton Road, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bike frame abandoned for weeks, 22nd March

item.title: Road covered in gravel, especially kerbside, 22nd March
item.description:
Noticed on Friday 20th March whilst cycling up the hill. There are large bits of gravel scattered across the road and accumulating into the sides of the road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 3, Anerley Hill, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Inappropriate use of A frames on footpath, 22nd March
item.description:
Grace London a church that hires out the 🔑 Duchy Street School space over evenings and weekends has inappropriately put up to a frames that take up at least half of the space on the public footpath. They are not paying for the use of the public footpath they are merely obstructing the way for the disabled blind and those who are elderly or less able to use the footpath in the first place. We have enough obstructions without this additional unnecessary clutter please instruct them to stop using this space inappropriately. Christianity should have a better view of society than to abuse public space

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 58, Stamford Street, Southwark, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped mattress, 22nd March
item.description:
Please can this dumped mattress and other fly-tipping be removed ASAP

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Grummant Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Hazelmere Road near Brondesbury Villas, 22nd March
item.description:
Fly tipping furniture

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hazelmere Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load

item.title: Perished road around dangerous manhole cover, 22nd March
item.description:
The man hole cover and lack of road spans two lanes where both lanes are both trying to avoid wheel damage and kerbing wheels. I have standard low profile tyres on standard stock wheels and this will either damage the rims and burst a tyre or cause cars to veer into one another causing a crash.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 4, Roman Way, Crayford, Dartford
Report on FixMyStreet
